feed.title: Scholar Alerts — Clean Feed
feed.subtitle: Google Scholar alerts reformatted as individual article entries

entry.title: Circular transformation of the European steel industry renders scrap metal a strategic resource
entry.content:
Authors: D Lee, M Hess, M Gerschberger, S Thurner, J Stangl... - Resources, Conservation & ..., 2026

Abstract: The steel industry accounts for 7% of global carbon dioxide emissions. The European Union aims to reduce these emissions by replacing basic oxygen furnaces with electric arc furnaces (EAFs). This transition requires stable access to ...

Alert: Stefan Thurner (keyword alert)
